The '''anti-air tank''', not to be confused with the much-later [[AAC-1 speeder tank]], was a model of anti-[[Airspeeder/Legends|aircraft]] ground vehicle. They were employed by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Veh-stub}}
